is_p_falciparum.evidence: Study of Plasmodium falciparum dhfr and dhps mutations in symptomatic children in Brazzaville.

reports_target_markers.evidence: Reports pfdhfr codons 51, 59, 108 and pfdhps codons 436, 437 (also assessed 540, 581, 613). Target markers include Pfdhfr 51,59,108 and Pfdhps 437,540,581,613.

sub_country_location.evidence: All isolates collected at Tenrikyo public health centre in Makélékélé district, Brazzaville — a specific sub-national site.

temporal_resolution_within_3y.evidence: Patients enrolled between October 2003 and February 2004, a window well under 3 years.

african_field_samples.evidence: Field/clinical isolates from children with uncomplicated malaria in Brazzaville, Congo.

is_primary_study.evidence: Primary in vivo efficacy study with molecular marker genotyping of collected isolates.

duplicate_risk.evidence: A new field collection in 2003-2004; mentions prior surveys (Nsimba 2001) as distinct studies, no indication these samples overlap a larger dataset.

supplement.evidence: All per-locus frequencies and the site location are in the main text and Tables 4 and 5.

assessment.summary: Primary in vivo SP efficacy study in children in Makélékélé district, Brazzaville, Congo (Oct 2003–Feb 2004). Reports extractable per-codon frequencies (n/N, N=80) for pfdhfr 51/59/108 and pfdhps 436/437 in Table 4, with a sub-national site and a collection window under 3 years. Eligible.
